granularity_boundary: A directory location can represent a multi-building campus at a mixed lifecycle stage. It is not one operating building or a disclosure of energized IT load.

lifecycle_reconciliation.interpretation: Not separately reported as an owned online site in the calendar-2024 environmental table; this does not prove the location is not operating in 2026.

investment.boundary: Published project investment is not incurred capex, book value, revenue, or operating capacity.

undisclosed_or_unreconciled: current operating, construction, commissioning, customer-acceptance, and revenue-start status
